title: dev-flow attachments, tunnel verify, ArgoCD fixes, wg-mesh, hetzner-node
description:
## Summary

- **dev-flow-plan**: prompt for supporting files before brainstorming and upload them to the Linear ticket on creation; verify brainstorm tunnel is reachable before announcing the URL (authorized_keys check + curl probe)
- **dev-flow-execute**: hint to attach failure screenshots/logs to the ticket on CI/verify failure
- **scripts/ticket-attach.sh**: helper to base64-upload files into `tickets.ticket_attachments` (10 MB inline cap)
- **hetzner-node skill**: updated with lessons from korczewski cluster reset
- **deployment-assist skill**: added ArgoCD blockers & common fixes
- **ArgoCD**: add missing cluster annotations and `ignoreDifferences` for k8s 1.35
- **wg-mesh**: add keys + endpoints for korczewski nodes (pk4/pk6/pk8)
- **docs/plans**: clean up archived systemtest plans; add brett-ux-overhaul plan + design spec

## Test plan

- [ ] `dev-flow-plan` prompts for attachments and verifies tunnel before announcing URL
- [ ] `ticket-attach.sh` uploads files correctly
- [ ] ArgoCD syncs cleanly without annotation drift warnings

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
